name: Ideal Gas Law Calculator
description: Calculate using PV = nRT ideal gas law.
seo_title: Ideal Gas Law Calculator – Instant Results
seo_description: Calculate using PV = nRT ideal gas law. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate pressure of 1 mol gas at 300K in 0.025 m3.
result_context: The missing variable is calculated: {missing} using PV = nRT where R = 8.314 J/(mol·K).
formula_display: PV = nRT (set one variable to 0 to solve for it)
steps: Given: P=202650 Pa, V=0.015 m³, n=1.2 mol, T=0 (unknown)
mistakes: Not setting exactly one variable to 0 for solving
Using wrong value for gas constant R
Using Celsius instead of Kelvin for temperature
desc: Free online ideal gas law calculator. Enter pressure and volume to get instant results.
